div1.entryFree:
Void, adj. 1) empty, not occupied: I'll get me to a place more v. Caes. II, 4, 37 (== less crowded).
2) ineffectual, vain, null: by this alliance to make v. my suit, H6C III, 3, 142.
3) destitute: v. and empty from any dram of mercy, Merch. IV, 1, 5. With of: v. of all profanation, Meas. II, 1, 55 (Elbow's speech). v. of truth, Merch. V, 189. v. of pity, H6B IV, 7, 69.
